itemdesc-wolfears: The ears of the yellow-eyed, fleabitten psychotic who runs Porta Aurea
itemdesc-madkingcrown: In hindsight, maybe I shouldn't have given him this. In my defense, it was very funny though...
itemdesc-vulkhat: A grand stovepipe hat that sports a heavy brass gear. Consider your punk steam'd
itemdesc-vulkdimmadome: I'm Vulk Dimmadome, owner of the Gildsdale Dimmadome! Thank you for saving my child Coal-Titan Dimmadome, heir to the Gildsdale Dimmadome fortune!
itemdesc-boater: The oversized crown of Marentia Aurea, after it was recovered from between the couch cushions it was mounted on a straw hat because it was too big to wear.
itemdesc-lolthimask: ...you're hard to look at, y'know that?
itemdesc-antimask: I have to warn you, I'm not saying this won't cover the disease up, but it won't exactly make you any prettier, y'know?
itemdesc-gauntlet: It's a smaller verion, that draws it's power from the greater gauntlet. Still dangerous. I hope you know what you're doing.
itemdesc-vornheathspear: Of course they wanted a weapon, so I made them one. It was big, dumb, inelegant, and completely devastating. Like them. It was perfect for them.
itemdesc-wolfsfang: I love you...and I miss you...and I'm going to find you.
itemdesc-badgevel: Just...promise you'll be the one to bury me, ok?
itemdesc-badgedrel: Please do not pawn this to pay off your debts.
itemdesc-badgecae: If anyone would deserve a medal, it would be a farmer.
itemdesc-badgevor: I don't know what's worse, the fact that you're a monster, or the fact that you're proud of it.
itemdesc-badgeseth: I know what you're doing. I just can't prove it yet.
blockdesc-relic: Andy...I've done a bad thing. And so have you.
blockdesc-kharrovasturn-east: It's an odd thing...a jar filled with the ashes and bones of countless dead kings. If you press your ear to it, you can almost hear their voices...
block-sethramorhand-east: The Great Mechanical Gauntlet of Transposition
blockdesc-sethramorhand-east: I made, a Master Key, to tie together and control the portals. Touching the key itself is inadvisable, it's mounted on a gauntlet for a reason.
blockdesc-drelmundscales-east: They were expecting a simple set of balances, but I opted for a sliding weight design instead. The scale may look finite, but the device is accurate to limitless precision.
blockdesc-caerithlecturn-east: Caerith was easy: they just wanted a lecturn to hold their books. No warping of reality, no infinite death, just a fine piece of furniture. In gratitude for an easy job, I gave them something extra...
blockdesc-kharrovasturn-north: It's an odd thing...a jar filled with the ashes and bones of countless dead kings. If you press your ear to it, you can almost hear their voices...
blockdesc-sethramorhand-north: I made, a Master Key, to tie together and control the portals. Touching the key itself is inadvisable, it's mounted on a gauntlet for a reason.
blockdesc-drelmundscales-north: They were expecting a simple set of balances, but I opted for a sliding weight design instead. The scale may look finite, but the device is accurate to limitless precision.
blockdesc-caerithlecturn-north: Caerith was easy: they just wanted a lecturn to hold their books. No warping of reality, no infinite death, just a fine piece of furniture. In gratitude for an easy job, I gave them something extra...
blockdesc-telex-east: A strange piece of equipment that serves little purpose when separated from a much larger machine...
blockdesc-cipher-east: A sophisticated telegraph cipher machine, built by the National Informatics Laboratory for diplomatic uses.
blockdesc-cipher-north: A sophisticated telegraph cipher machine, built by the National Informatics Laboratory for diplomatic uses.
